items.title: Looking back, early Facebook's philosophy of "fixing bugs in production" sounded crazy to…
items.title_zh: 回顾过去，Facebook 早期“修复生产中的错误”的理念听起来很疯狂……
items.description: Looking back, early Facebook's philosophy of "fixing bugs in production" sounded crazy to most people. Maybe the modern version of that is, just let your source code be public. If software is so dynamic, maybe this isn't so crazy. Or maybe…
items.description_zh: 回顾过去，Facebook 早期“修复生产中的错误”的理念对大多数人来说听起来很疯狂。也许现代版本是，让你的源代码公开。如果软件如此动态，也许这并没有那么疯狂。或者也许……
